description: Giant vermin and creepy crawlies — oversized bugs, arachnids, and insectoid horrors.
creatures: An oversized ant with mandibles that shear through wood, tirelessly serving the colony.
A massive, glossy-shelled beetle that rams with its horn and shrugs off blows on its armored back.
A many-legged horror with venomous bite that skitters across walls with alarming speed.
A buzzing predator with a paralytic stinger that drags victims back to its nest alive.
A statue-still predator that swivels its alien head, then lashes out with scythe-like forelegs.
A swarming, crop-devouring plague that leaps tremendous distances and darkens fields.
A skittering, filth-covered vermin that survives almost anything and spreads disease wherever it nests.
A spider that blinks between dimensions, appearing behind prey and vanishing before they can swing.
A blood-sucking flying pest with a mosquito-like proboscis that latches on and drinks its fill.
A horse-sized burrowing bug that erupts from the soil and sprays acid from its dripping mandibles.
A rotting demon-insect hybrid with diseased claws and a stench that wilts plants.
A shambling construct woven from animated spider silk that entangles everything it touches.
